data.title: An account with over $1.7 million in profits purchased $300,000 worth of shares in Game 5 of the Western Conference First Round of the NBA Playoffs, in which the Rockets defeated the Lakers.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer's monitoring, in Polymarket's "NBA Western Conference First Round Game 5 Rockets vs. Lakers" prediction event, an account (0x8c80d213c0cbad777d06ee3f58f6ca4bc03102c3) with a profit exceeding $1.7 million purchased $300,000 worth of shares betting on the Rockets to defeat the Lakers. The average opening price was 39.9¢, and the current price is 40.5¢, resulting in a floating loss of approximately $46 million. The Rockets lead the series 1-3 in the NBA Western Conference First Round, with Game 5 scheduled for 10:00 AM Beijing time today. Reports indicate that Lakers star Luka Doncic will miss the initial stages of the second round, and his return timeline remains unclear. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, anticipating changes before prices are set.

data.title: Most crypto stocks closed lower on the US stock market, with HOOD falling more than 13.24%.

Most crypto stocks weakened, with HOOD falling over 13.24%, HODL falling 15.96%, Coinbase falling 6.37%, MSTR falling 4.54%, and SBET falling 4.24%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

The BVIX (BTC Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 41.40, a daily decrease of 1.43%. The EVIX (ETH Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 59.04, a daily increase of 0.92%. In global stock indices, the Euro Stoxx 50 fell 0.75% to 5,789.75 points; the UK FTSE 100 rose 0.14% to 10,210.64 points; and the German DAX 40 rose 0.24% to 23,894.85 points. In commodities, WTI crude oil fell 1.29% to $109.39 per barrel, and Brent crude oil fell 0.78% to $116.85 per barrel. Gate allows users to directly trade traditional financial market products on its platform, providing a one-stop solution for precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration of crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi features have been fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to easily participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities outside the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.

data.title: Trump Administration Opposes Expanded Access to Mythos Model, Sources Say
data.description: The Trump administration has reportedly informed Anthropic of its opposition to expanding access to the Mythos model, according to sources cited by the Wall Street Journal. This development comes amid ongoing discussions about the implications of AI technology and its accessibility. Anthropic, known for its advancements in AI, faces challenges in navigating regulatory concerns as it seeks to broaden the reach of its Mythos model.

data.title: Arbitrum Security Council Member Criticizes Circle's Response to Hacker Threats
data.description: Griff Green, a member of the Arbitrum Security Council, has expressed criticism towards Circle's handling of hacker threats. According to NS3.AI, Green suggested that the community might consider selling USDC due to Circle's inaction. He pointed out that while Tether takes proactive measures to freeze hacker funds, Circle has not taken similar steps. Green argued that Circle appears to prioritize profitability over the foundational principles of the cryptocurrency industry.

data.title: Printr's Public Sale Faces Uncertainty as Probability of Raising Over $4 Million Drops
data.description: Polymarket has adjusted the probability of Printr's public sale raising more than $4 million to 63%, marking a decline of over 30% within a day. According to NS3.AI, the contract has seen nearly $3.26 million in trading volume. Project data indicates that more than $2.46 million has been raised with approximately 35 hours remaining in the fundraising period.

data.title: Sources: The cost of a US war against Iran may exceed $25 billion.
data.description: Sources say the Pentagon's previous estimate of approximately $25 billion for the war with Iran may be underestimated, as the figure did not include repair costs for damaged US military bases in the region. (Jinshi)

data.title: Trump Gold Card Visa Program Sees Limited Applications
data.description: On April 30, Jin10 reported, citing the Financial Times, that since the U.S. launched the 'Trump Gold Card' visa program last year, priced at $1 million per card, only 338 individuals have applied. Of these, 165 applicants paid the $15,000 processing fee, and just 59 have progressed to the Department of Homeland Security's subsequent review stage. According to a court document, Justice Department officials stated that the program has not affected the approval process for other visas, which have seen tens of thousands of applications.

data.title: In 2020, the top-ranked SHIB address transferred $4.91 million worth of tokens to a CEX.
data.description: According to crypto analyst EmberCN, a whale that bought 103 trillion SHIB at 37.8 ETH in the early days transferred 800 billion SHIB to exchanges in the past 24 hours, worth approximately $4.91 million. This address held approximately $9.1 billion worth of SHIB at its 2021 high and currently holds approximately 95.42 trillion SHIB, representing about 16.2% of the total supply, worth approximately $588 million at current prices.

data.description: On Apr 30, 2026, 00:36 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 76,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 76,068.882813 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.31% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Google Unveils TPU8t and TPU8i at Google Cloud Next 2026
data.description: Google has officially launched its eighth-generation AI chips, TPU8t and TPU8i, at the Google Cloud Next 2026 conference. According to Jin10, this marks the first time Google has designed separate chips for training and inference since the inception of TPU. The new chips feature updated configuration schemes for cluster networking. China International Capital Corporation (CICC) suggests that this specialized AI hardware infrastructure is expected to enhance the efficiency of large model training and inference, thereby reinforcing the 'flywheel effect' of cost reduction and increased demand. From an industry chain perspective, CICC remains optimistic about core investment areas such as optical communication, chip customization services, storage, and wafer foundry.

Previous reports indicated that an address suspected to belong to the Block Street team transferred 5 million BSB tokens to Bybit, with a total value of approximately $3.65 million.

data.title: The probability of Polymarket's "Printr public sale raising over $4 million" has fallen to 63%, a drop of over 30% within the day.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, the probability of Printr raising over $4 million in its public sale on Polymarket has dropped to 63%, a decrease of over 30% within the day, with a trading volume of nearly $3.26 million. Printr is a cross-chain token issuance platform that allows users and AI agents to issue, trade, and stake tokens in a multi-chain environment. It is currently deployed on eight blockchains, including Solana, Base, BNB Chain, and Ethereum, and offers features such as customizable fee structures, cross-chain transactions, and staking incentive mechanisms. Data shows that the project has currently raised over $2.46 million, with approximately 35 hours remaining until the fundraising ends. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, anticipating changes before pricing.

data.title: Samsung Electronics Reports Record Quarterly Profits
data.description: Samsung Electronics reported a significant increase in its first-quarter operating profit, which rose by 756.1% year-on-year to 57.23 trillion won (approximately $38.5 billion), setting a new quarterly record. According to Jin10, the majority of this profit was driven by its chip business. Additionally, revenue increased by 69.2% to 133.87 trillion won, while net profit surged by 474.3% to 47.23 trillion won. The Device Solutions division, responsible for its semiconductor operations, achieved revenue of 81.7 trillion won and an operating profit of 53.7 trillion won. These results significantly exceeded market expectations. Financial data provider FnGuide reported that local brokerage firms had anticipated revenue of 117.13 trillion won and operating profit of 38.12 trillion won over the past month. Samsung Electronics' latest quarterly revenue and operating profit figures surpassed the previous record highs set in the prior quarter, which were 93.84 trillion won and 20.07 trillion won, respectively.

data.title: Citic Securities Maintains Forecast for Fed Rate Cut Under Warsh
data.description: On April 30, Citic Securities released a report stating that it maintains its previous view, projecting a single 25 basis point rate cut in the second half of the year if Kevin Warsh becomes the Federal Reserve Chairman. According to Jin10, the report emphasizes the importance of closely monitoring the statements of the 12 current voting members of the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC). The path of the Federal Reserve's monetary policy is increasingly dependent on the balance of votes among FOMC members, while the individual speeches of the Fed Chair have less influence on market guidance compared to the past.

data.title: U.S. Government Seeks to Seize Oil Tankers Linked to Iran
data.description:
The U.S. government is reportedly seeking to seize two oil tankers intercepted by the U.S. Navy, which are linked to Iran. According to Odaily, a senior White House official disclosed that the U.S. Department of Justice has initiated the seizure process. However, the official did not provide details on the procedure or clarify whether the move involves confiscating the crude oil on board.

The official, who requested anonymity, cited 'operational security' as the reason for not disclosing the final disposition of the vessels or commenting on their current routes. According to the U.S. Department of Defense, the U.S. Navy intercepted and boarded the two tankers on April 20 and 22 in the Indian Ocean, suspecting them of transporting oil from Iran. The report noted that the tankers continued to sail in the Indian Ocean in the following days, apparently changing course multiple times.

data.title: The US XRP spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $3.5914 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, XRP spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $3.5914 million yesterday (April 29th, Eastern Time). The XRP spot ETF with the largest net inflow yesterday was the Bitwise XRP ETF (XRP), with a net inflow of $2.1204 million, bringing its total historical net inflow to $428 million. The second largest was the Franklin XRP ETF (XRPZ), with a net inflow of $1.4711 million, bringing its total historical net inflow to $350 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of XRP spot ETFs was $1.036 billion, with an XRP net asset ratio of 1.23%, and a cumulative historical net inflow of $1.296 billion.

data.title: SoftBank plans to launch and list its AI company "Roze" in the United States.
data.description: According to the Financial Times, sources revealed that SoftBank Group plans to establish and list an independent intelligent robotics and data center company called "Roze" in the United States. SoftBank plans to list Roze this year, targeting a valuation of $100 billion. SoftBank CEO Masayoshi Son is driving this process, a move aimed at offsetting the company's tens of billions of dollars invested in artificial intelligence. SoftBank has been continuously increasing its debt, and Son is trying to position himself as a key figure in the global AI boom, having made a large-scale investment in OpenAI. (Jinshi)

data.title: AI TRENDS | SoftBank Plans to Launch and List Roze in the U.S. with $100 Billion Valuation
data.description: SoftBank Group is reportedly planning to establish and list an independent company named Roze in the United States, according to the Financial Times. The company, focused on smart robotics and data centers, is expected to go public within this year with a target valuation of $100 billion. SoftBank CEO Masayoshi Son is actively driving this initiative to offset the company's substantial investments in the artificial intelligence sector. SoftBank has been increasing its debt, while Son aims to position himself as a key figure in the global AI boom, having made significant investments in OpenAI.
